EmailTemplate.description: General Template for NAO/APO/EMEA region users in Container Service.
EmailTemplate.name: CONTAINER RSMGeneralEmailTemplate
EmailTemplate.subject: Audit Email Notification
EmailTemplate.textOnly: Hello, {!CONTAINER_Audit__c.Name} has been {!CONTAINER_Audit__c.CONTAINER_Audit_Result__c}. Audit details- Account Name : {!CONTAINER_Audit__c.CONTAINER_ASP_Nmae_Audited__c} Audit Number: {!CONTAINER_Audit__c.Name} Audit Record Created by: {!CONTAINER_Audit__c.CreatedBy} Actions Required: {!CONTAINER_Audit__c.CONTAINER_Actions_Required__c} Click on the link to access the case: {!CONTAINER_Audit__c.Link}
